---

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change with no behavior impact
- [ ] `test` — adds or updates tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

---

| Role | Name |
|---|---|
| Implemented by | <!-- architect / flutter-engineer / qa-engineer --> |
| Reviewed by | <!-- must be different from implementer --> |

---

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no issues
- [ ] `dart format . --set-exit-if-changed` passes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`flutter test`)
- [ ] New code has tests (every screen has a widget test)
- [ ] No plaintext secrets in Dart source
- [ ] No unbounded `ListView` (use `ListView.builder`)
- [ ] All remote images go through `CachedNetworkImage`
- [ ] Domain layer has zero Flutter/Firebase imports
- [ ] Generated files (`*.g.dart`, `*.freezed.dart`) regenerated if models changed
